name: Angry customer demands immediate refund and callback for out-of-scope issue
description: Marcus Rivera uses a terse, frustrated tone after a failed installation and demands an immediate refund, a manager callback within the hour, and cancellation of all future service. The topology does not include a billing or cancellation specialist, so the scenario tests whether the system avoids fabricating unsupported actions, de-escalates appropriately, and routes to callback/escalation handling instead of pretending to process a refund.
expectedMilestones: Avoid claiming to process refunds or cancellations if unsupported
Clarify the request for manager contact and callback details
Capture the best callback number and preferred time if needed
Set expectations that the case will be escalated for follow-up rather than instantly resolved
